description: Multiple small-parts bins had faded or missing location labels, and several bins held mixed SKUs without partition labels.
operational_implication: Ambiguous bin identity makes accurate picking and counting difficult, contributing to the reported count-vs-ERP discrepancies.
suggested_follow_up: Relabel affected bin zones and confirm one-SKU-per-location discipline; sample-count a labeled vs unlabeled zone to compare accuracy.
consultant_notes: Photographed several bins; this looks like a strong quick-win candidate.
